answers: Best e-readers: Kindle Paperwhite (best value), Kindle Oasis (premium), Kobo Libra (best for library books).
E-book benefits: carry thousands of books, adjustable text size, built-in dictionary, read in dark, lightweight.
Read e-books: Kindle app (any device), Kobo, Apple Books, Google Play Books, or Libby (free from library).
Kindle vs Kobo: Kindle has bigger store and better ecosystem. Kobo supports more formats and integrates with libraries.
